# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    card 1 {
        card-type iom-1
        mda 1 {
            mda-type me6-100gb-qsfp28
        }
    }
    port 1/1/c1 {
        admin-state enable
        connector {
            breakout c1-100g
        }
    }
    port 1/1/c1/1 {
        admin-state enable
    }
    port 1/1/c2 {
        admin-state enable
        connector {
            breakout c1-100g
        }
    }
    port 1/1/c2/1 {
        admin-state enable
    }
    lag "lag-1" {
        admin-state enable
        lacp {
            mode active
            administrative-key 1
        }
        port 1/1/c1/1 {
        }
        port 1/1/c2/1 {
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        interface "to-peer" {
            port lag-1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
